name: wiki
description: LLM-compiled knowledge bases for Codex. Build topic-scoped wikis, ingest sources and external collections, compile articles, run truth-seeking audits, query, lint, research, and generate outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Build, audit, and maintain topic-scoped research wikis
interface.longDescription: Bundle the llm-wiki workflow for Codex: initialize a wiki, ingest sources and external collections, compile articles, audit outputs and provenance, query knowledge, lint structure, run research, and generate outputs.
defaultPrompt: Research a new topic and compile it into a wiki.
Ingest these notes or an external source collection into my wiki and update the indexes.
Audit this wiki output and tell me if I can trust it.
Lint this wiki and fix structural issues.
